channel.title: Nerdy Fiction — Latest Chapters
channel.description: New visual-novel chapters as they publish on nerdyfiction.com.

item.title: Ordinary Gods — Chapter 1: Ordinary Gods
item.description: The universe does not announce itself. On the last night of 2026, at exactly 10:00 PM Eastern, something changes. Twelve people hesitate. Robert Calloway is one of them — and an oversized art book in a Studio City waiting room is about to refuse to fall.
